_instructions: To add a new case study: (1) add an object to `studies`, (2) drop photos into the theme `assets/` folder with a `cs-` prefix and register each filename in snippets/case-study-assets.liquid, (3) reference them in the `photos` array as `asset:filename.jpg`, (4) create a Shopify page with the same `slug` as its handle and assign template `page.case-study`. The first entry in `photos` becomes the hero AND the card cover; the rest render as a gallery with a click-to-zoom lightbox. The `hero_image` and `gallery` fields are still supported for back-compat.

studies.title: Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka 2026
studies.subtitle: A custom statue award for SumanTV Kannada's flagship recognition program
studies.tagline: When a TV network needs a trophy that looks as iconic as their brand mark — we make the brand the trophy.

photos.alt: Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka 2026 trophy — a gold sculpted 'S' wrapping a blue globe, topped with the SumanTV Kannada Chikkaballapur logo, mounted on a polished wood base with engraved gold nameplate.
photos.caption: The finished award, ready for the broadcast ceremony

studies.about_client: SumanTV Kannada is the Kannada-language arm of the SumanTV digital news network (parent: PlayEven Info Pvt Ltd, Hyderabad). The Chikkaballapur district unit produces local Karnataka news, civic stories and human-interest features for YouTube and OTT audiences. SumanTV's regional channels collectively reach millions of viewers across South India.
studies.about_event: The Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka Awards (ಸುಮನ ಸಾಧಕ — literally 'noble achiever') is SumanTV Kannada's flagship recognition program, honouring individuals whose perseverance, craft and public contribution have shifted the cultural needle in Karnataka. The 2026 edition's honourees include the India Women's Blind Cricket team captains — Deepika TC, Kavya V and Kavya NR — recognised for excellence on the international stage.
studies.design_brief: The client wanted a trophy that read as the brand at a glance. Most TV-award trophies bolt a logo plate onto a generic statue — we inverted that. The award itself is a sculpted, oversized 'S' (the channel's brand initial) sweeping around a richly enamelled globe, with the network's badge as the crown. Every angle reinforces the channel's identity; the engraved gold plaque on the wood plinth carries the event line.
production_notes: Sculpted 'S' form in cast metal with electroplated 24K gold-tone finish
Hand-painted enamel globe with metallic gold continents
Brushed-gold disc inlay carrying the SumanTV Kannada Chikkaballapur logo, mounted at the crown of the 'S'
Mirror-polished solid wood plinth with chamfered profile
Engraved brass nameplate in bordered serif type: 'KARNATAKA SUMANA SADHAKA 2026'
studies.outcome: Delivered on time for the awards ceremony. The trophy has become the visual anchor of SumanTV Kannada's award show coverage — featured in every broadcast cutaway, photo op and social post around the program.

studies.title: SOBHA Sales Toppers FY 2025-26
studies.subtitle: Twelve recognition trophies, three families, one annual sales kickoff and Magnus launch night
studies.tagline: Three trophy families. One annual recognition cycle. India's most-awarded developer trusts Meru.

photos.alt: SOBHA Q-wise Sales Topper trophy lineup — six gold-star + crystal-globe trophies on maroon columns and black plinths, plaques engraved with awardee names for Q1, Q3 and Q4 FY 2025-26.
photos.caption: Set A: Q1, Q3 and Q4 Sales Toppers across the Business Leader, STM and ACH tracks.

photos.alt: SOBHA Annual Sales Topper crystal pillars — three tall optical-grade crystal awards with diamond-cut, slant-cut and crystal-globe tops on black plinths.
photos.caption: Set B: Annual Sales Topper + 1st Runner-Up — the full-year leadership awards.

photos.alt: SOBHA Star of the Launch (Magnox) trophies — three red and gold star-and-crystal trophies on maroon backdrop, marking the Magnus pre-launch sales champions.
photos.caption: Set C: Star of the Launch — recognising the Magnus pre-launch sales champions.

studies.about_client: SOBHA Limited is one of India's largest fully backward-integrated real-estate developers. Headquartered in Bengaluru since 1995 and listed on NSE/BSE, the group owns the full delivery stack — interiors, glazing, MEP and concrete — and has collected 265+ industry awards including Times Real Estate Developer of the Year (Residential) and the Golden Peacock CSR Award in 2024–25.
studies.about_event: SOBHA's annual sales recognition for FY 2025-26 ran three concurrent tracks — Q-wise toppers, full-year toppers, and a dedicated launch-team recognition for the SOBHA Magnus ("Magnox") pre-launch campaign on Bannerghatta Road. Recurring top performers across roles included Chethan R D, Veena M K, Pranav C and Souganth B.
studies.design_brief: Three distinct silhouettes that still read as one set: a punchy gold-star recognition piece for quarterly toppers, a tall executive crystal pillar for annual winners, and a launch-themed red-and-gold star with maroon backdrop for the Magnus champions.
production_notes: Gold-plated zinc star with lightning cut-out on maroon acrylic column, crystal globe on stem
Optical-grade crystal pillar with diamond-cut, slant-cut and globe-top variants
Engraved brass-gold plaque with offset wordmark + awardee + period
Lacquered ply plinth with bevel detail and gold trim band
studies.outcome: All 12 trophies delivered in a single batch with consistent plaque typography across families — letting SOBHA stage a multi-category awards night without the family-to-family aesthetic break that usually happens with split vendors.

studies.title: UDAAN DSM & FSO Excellence Awards — April 2026
studies.subtitle: Custom eagle trophies for insurance field sales champions across Tamil Nadu
studies.tagline: Eagle trophies for the field champions of a Tamil Nadu insurance sales blitz.

photos.alt: UDAAN DSM & FSO Excellence Award — eagle trophy with engraved plaque, Tamil Nadu April 2026
photos.caption: UDAAN eagle award for April 2026 DSM & FSO Excellence.

studies.about_client: UDAAN is a high-performance sales incentive programme run by an insurance company in Tamil Nadu, recognising top District Sales Managers (DSM) and Field Sales Officers (FSO) for outstanding performance.
studies.about_event: The April 2026 UDAAN Excellence Awards celebrated the best field sales performers across Tamil Nadu's insurance distribution network. Eagle trophies were presented to DSM and FSO category winners.
studies.design_brief: Die-cast eagle on a solid plinth with gold-finish engraved nameplate. The eagle motif reflects the programme's aspirational 'UDAAN' (flight) theme.
production_notes: Die-cast eagle trophy with gold finish
Engraved plaque with awardee name, role, region and month
Solid plinth base
studies.outcome: Custom eagle trophies delivered for the UDAAN April 2026 DSM and FSO Excellence Awards, Tamil Nadu.

studies.title: Bangalore SAWTA — Guru Kunami 2026
studies.subtitle: Mementos for a Santali cultural celebration honouring Padmashree Dr. Damayanti Besra
studies.tagline: Honouring tradition and Padmashree excellence at a Santali Guru Kunami in Bengaluru.

photos.alt: Bangalore SAWTA Guru Kunami 2026 memento trophy with engraved plaque for Padmashree Dr. Damayanti Besra
photos.caption: Memento presented at Bangalore SAWTA Guru Kunami 2026.

studies.about_client: Bangalore SAWTA is a Santali cultural organisation based in Bengaluru, dedicated to preserving and promoting Santali tribal arts, music and dance traditions among the Santali diaspora in Karnataka.
studies.about_event: Guru Kunami — the Santali equivalent of Guru Purnima — was celebrated on 10 May 2026. The event hosted Padmashree Dr. Damayanti Besra (renowned Santali classical dancer and former principal, Odisha) as Chief Guest and Mr. Rajendra Saren as Guest of Honour.
studies.design_brief: Understated memento trophy / plaque engraved with the event name, date and guest designation — befitting a cultural felicitation ceremony.
production_notes: Engraved memento plaque with event title and guest name
Cultural motif finish appropriate for a tribal arts celebration
studies.outcome: Mementos crafted and delivered for the Guru Kunami 2026 ceremony of Bangalore SAWTA.

studies.title: SBI Life Insurance — Annual L&D Meet 2025-26

photos.alt: SBI Life Insurance Annual L&D Meet 2025-26 Eklavya Review recognition trophy with engraved plaque
photos.caption: Eklavya Review recognition trophy — SBI Life L&D Meet 2025-26.

studies.about_client: SBI Life Insurance is one of India's largest private life insurance companies, a joint venture between State Bank of India and BNP Paribas Cardif. Its L&D function runs the flagship Eklavya programme — a self-directed learning initiative for its national field sales force.
studies.about_event: The Annual L&D Meet 2025-26 brought together SBI Life's learning and development leaders to review the year's Eklavya programme outcomes. Recognition trophies were awarded to outstanding individual achievers (Rajeev Sharma, Delhi) and best Area L&D Manager with Team (Soni Amit, Ahmedabad).
studies.design_brief: Professional recognition trophies engraved with the Eklavya Review branding, awardee name, role and region — suitable for an internal national HR/L&D ceremony.
production_notes: Recognition trophy with gold finish
Engraved plaque with Eklavya Review branding, awardee name and region
studies.outcome: Recognition trophies delivered for SBI Life Insurance's Annual L&D Meet 2025-26 Eklavya Review — individual and team categories.

studies.about_client: The Oxford College of Law, Bangalore is one of Karnataka's leading law schools, approved by the Bar Council of India and affiliated to Karnataka State Law University. Located in HSR Layout, the college offers B.A. LL.B., BBA LL.B. and LL.B. programmes.
studies.about_event: Target 60 is an internal academic challenge programme at Oxford College of Law. Phase I for the 2025-26 academic year recognised top-performing students. The 2nd Runner Up award went to Srinath from the B.A. LL.B. 8th Semester.
studies.design_brief: Clean academic trophy with engraved plaque citing the programme name, phase, position and student name — appropriate for a formal law school prize-giving.
production_notes: Academic recognition trophy
Engraved plaque: Target 60 Phase I, position, student name, semester
studies.outcome: Trophies delivered for The Oxford College of Law's Target 60 Phase I 2025-26 academic recognition programme.

studies.about_client: Achiever Cricket Academy is a Bengaluru-based cricket coaching academy dedicated to developing passionate cricketers of all ages and abilities. The academy offers professional coaching, fitness training, tournaments, and one-to-one mentoring.
studies.about_event: The 2026 Achievement Awards recognised top performers at Achiever Cricket Academy's seasonal programme — celebrating emerging talent in Bengaluru's youth cricket ecosystem.
studies.design_brief: Sports achievement trophy with cricket motif, engraved with academy name, year and awardee details.

studies.title: Edappayil Family Meet 2K26

photos.alt: Edappayil Family Meet 2K26 personalised memento trophy with engraved plaque
photos.caption: Family Meet 2K26 memento — presented for Exceptional Achievement.

studies.about_client: The Edappayil family is a Kerala joint family celebrating its annual reunion — a tradition of togetherness marked with personalised mementos for those who have excelled during the year.
studies.about_event: Family Meet 2K26 brought the Edappayil family together for their annual reunion. Custom engraved mementos were presented to members recognised for Exceptional Achievement during the year.
studies.design_brief: Warm, personalised memento trophy with 'Family Meet 2K26' and 'Presented for Exceptional Achievement' engraved — a keepsake that balances celebration with elegance.

Engraved: Family Meet 2K26, Exceptional Achievement
Suitable for gifting at a family celebration

studies.title: Guruvandana Alumni Reunion 2026 — Govt. High School Arsikere
studies.subtitle: Honouring teachers and celebrating 20 years of alumni from the 2005–2026 batch
studies.tagline: A shield of gratitude for two decades of teachers, from the 2005–2026 batch of Arsikere's finest.

photos.alt: Government High School Arsikere alumni reunion shield — Guruvandana 2026
photos.caption: Red velvet shield plaque with gold Kannada text — presented at the Guruvandana & Sneha Sammilana event, 26 April 2026.

photos.alt: Shield held by person at Meru Trophy store, Bangalore
photos.caption: Custom shield ready for delivery ahead of the 26 April 2026 alumni reunion.

studies.about_client: Government High School, Arsikere is a state government school under Karnataka's Department of School Education, located in Arsikere town, Hassan district. The institution has nurtured students across two decades, producing alumni who organised this special reunion to honour their teachers.
studies.about_event: Guruvandana (ಗುರುವಂದನಾ) — 'Teacher Appreciation' — combined with Sneha Sammilana (ಸ್ನೇಹ ಸಮ್ಮಿಲನ) — 'Alumni Friendship Reunion' — brought together all alumni from the 2005–2026 batch on 26 April 2026 in Arsikere. The event celebrated the bond between students and teachers with traditional Kannada ceremonies and a heartfelt shield presentation.
studies.design_brief: Red velvet shield plaque with gold metallic print in Kannada, featuring decorative gold floral border, blue enamel gem accent, Swami Vivekananda and Basavanna illustrations, and star-with-ribbon base emblem.
production_notes: Red velvet shield with gold-finish metallic plate
Full Kannada text engraved/printed on gold plate
Decorative motifs: floral border, blue enamel accent, three illustrated figures
Star-with-ribbon base emblem
Event date 26/04/2026 printed on shield
studies.outcome: Custom shield plaque delivered for the Guruvandana & Sneha Sammilana alumni reunion at Government High School, Arsikere — a meaningful keepsake honouring the teachers of the 2005–2026 batches.

studies.title: Annual Sports Meet 2025-26 — KLE Society's Degree College
studies.subtitle: Custom gold medals for Bangalore's premier degree college annual sports event
studies.tagline: Gold medals bearing the KLE Society crest — honouring athletic excellence at Nagarbhavi's flagship degree college.

photos.alt: KLE Society's Degree College Annual Sports Meet 2025-26 gold medal — front face with engraved text
photos.caption: Gold medal front — 'KLE Society's Degree College, Nagarbhavi, Bangalore — Annual Sports Meet 2025-26'.

photos.alt: KLE Sports Meet medal lanyard ribbon with Olympic rings and college name
photos.caption: Blue-and-white checkered lanyard with KLE Society branding and Olympic rings motif.

photos.alt: KLE Society medal back showing Lingayat Education Society crest and Olympic rings
photos.caption: Medal reverse — KLE Society (Lingayat Education Society) crest with Olympic rings border.

studies.about_client: KLE Society's Degree College, Nagarbhavi is a premier undergraduate college in Bengaluru, established in 2008 under the KLE Society (Karnataka Lingayat Education Society). Affiliated with Bangalore University and holding NAAC 'A' grade accreditation, the college offers BBA, BCA and B.Com programmes. KLE Society manages over 200 educational institutions across Karnataka and Maharashtra.
studies.about_event: The Annual Sports Meet 2025-26 is KLE Degree College Nagarbhavi's flagship athletics event for the academic year. The meet recognises top performers across track and field, ball sports, and other athletic disciplines, promoting sportsmanship and physical fitness among students.
studies.design_brief: Gold circular medals with the college name, event title and year engraved on the front face; KLE Society crest and Olympic rings on the reverse; blue-and-white checkered lanyard ribbon with full college name and event printed.
production_notes: Gold-finish circular medal, die-cast
Front engraving: KLE Society's Degree College, Nagarbhavi, Bangalore — Annual Sports Meet 2025-26
Reverse: KLE Society (Lingayat Education Society) crest + Olympic rings border
Custom blue-and-white checkered lanyard ribbon with college name and event printed
studies.outcome: Custom sports medals delivered for KLE Society's Degree College Annual Sports Meet 2025-26 — celebrating athletic achievement at one of Bangalore's NAAC A-grade colleges.

studies.title: IMC Choir Harmonix — An Evening of Quartets 2026
studies.subtitle: Custom crystal round memento presented to EPMC QUARTET at Immanuel CSI Malayalam Church’s Harmonix music event in Bangalore
studies.tagline: Honouring the EPMC QUARTET at Harmonix — An Evening of Quartets, presented by IMC Choir Bangalore.

photos.alt: IMC Choir Harmonix crystal round memento — front face showing IMC Choir logo, Harmonix branding, and EPMC QUARTET citation
photos.caption: Crystal round memento — IMC Choir’s Harmonix event presented to EPMC QUARTET, 18.4.2026.

photos.alt: IMC Choir Harmonix crystal memento — base engraved ‘Immanuel CSI Malayalam Church, Bangalore’ with full crystal face and stand
photos.caption: Engraved crystal base reads ‘Immanuel CSI Malayalam Church, Bangalore’ — full memento with clear acrylic stand.

studies.about_client: Immanuel CSI Malayalam Church (IMC), Bangalore is a congregation of the Church of South India serving the Malayali Christian community. The IMC Choir is the church’s dedicated music ministry, known for its choral performances and community music events across Bangalore.
studies.about_event: Harmonix — An Evening of Quartets was a choral music event hosted by IMC Choir on 18 April 2026. The event brought together vocal quartets for an evening of worship music. As a token of appreciation, the IMC Choir presented a personalised crystal round memento to the EPMC QUARTET, honouring their heartfelt worship and contribution to the evening.
studies.design_brief: Octagonal-edge crystal round plaque on a clear acrylic stand. The face carries the IMC Choir logo, the event name ‘Harmonix’, the presentation inscription, recipient name (EPMC QUARTET), appreciation text, a Bible verse (Isaiah 12:5), and the date 18.4.2026. The acrylic base is engraved with the full church name.
production_notes: Octagonal-edge round crystal disc with laser engraving
Clear acrylic rectangular stand/base
IMC Choir logo + Harmonix event branding on face
Bible verse citation and appreciation message engraved
Base engraved: Immanuel CSI Malayalam Church, Bangalore
Presented in a padded gift box
studies.outcome: Crystal round memento delivered for IMC Choir’s Harmonix — An Evening of Quartets music event, Bangalore, April 2026.

studies.title: Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti — Temple Renovation Festival 2026
studies.subtitle: Framed gold plaque memento and engraved shield trophy for the temple renovation and consecration grand festival of Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti, Bangalore Rural
studies.event: Sri Basaveshwaraswami Devalaya Punar Nirmana Mattu Prathisthapana Mahotsava
studies.tagline: Commemorating the grand renovation and consecration festival of Sri Basaveshwaraswami Temple, Bangalore Rural — 20 April 2026.

photos.alt: Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti teal framed memento — gold plaque with Nandi motif and Kannada engraving, base reads ‘Nenapin Kaanike’
photos.caption: Teal-framed gold plaque memento — Sri Basaveshwaraswami temple renovation festival souvenir, 20.04.2026.

photos.alt: Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti shield trophy — black and gold layered shield with Nandi motif, stars, and laurel wreath, Kannada engraving and ‘Nenapin Kaanike’ base
photos.caption: Black and gold shield trophy with Nandi motif and stars — presented at the Basaveshwaraswami temple consecration festival.

studies.about_client: Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti is a registered temple trust committee based in Bangalore Rural, Karnataka, dedicated to the upkeep, management, and celebration of Sri Basaveshwaraswami Temple. The samiti organises religious events, festivals, and the renovation of the temple premises.
studies.about_event: On 20 April 2026 (Monday), Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti hosted a grand Mahotsava (grand festival) to celebrate the renovation and consecration (Prathisthapana) of Sri Basaveshwaraswami Devalaya. The samiti commissioned two commemorative pieces from Meru Trophy — a teal-framed gold plaque memento and a black-and-gold shield trophy — both inscribed in Kannada with the Nandi motif and the base label ‘Nenapin Kaanike’ (Souvenir / Memento).
studies.design_brief: Two pieces for the same event: (1) A teal-green framed memento with gold border and a central gold plaque featuring the Nandi (Basaveshwara bull) motif, the samiti name, event details in Kannada, and the date 20-04-2026. Base plate reads ‘Nenapin Kaanike’. (2) A black-and-gold shield trophy with layered acrylic shield shape, stars at the top, laurel wreath border, Nandi motif inset, Kannada event text, and matching ‘Nenapin Kaanike’ gold base strip.
production_notes: Teal-green wood/MDF frame with gold border inlay
Central gold printed plaque: Nandi motif + Kannada text + date
Separate black-and-gold shield trophy: layered acrylic/wood shield shape
Stars and laurel wreath embossed in gold on shield
All text engraved/printed in Kannada script
Base label: ‘Nenapin Kaanike’ (ನೆನಪಿನ ಕಾಣಿಕೆ)
studies.outcome: Teal framed gold plaque and shield trophy delivered for Sri Basaveshwaraswami Seva Samiti’s temple renovation and consecration grand festival, Bangalore Rural, April 2026.

studies.title: The Office Challenge 2026
studies.subtitle: Custom trophies for a spirited corporate games tournament — Carrom King, Box Cricket, Dart, Snake & Ladder, and Jenga champions crowned.
studies.event: The Office Challenge — Inter-departmental Games Tournament
studies.tagline: Where every desk jockey becomes a champion.

photos.alt: The Office Challenge 2026 — Carrom King trophies: Winner, Runner Up, and 2nd Runner Up with carrom board design
photos.caption: Carrom King trophies — each featuring a custom carrom board face mounted on a polished red base.

photos.alt: The Office Challenge 2026 — Box Cricket Champions trophy with red cricket ball and gold wing design
photos.caption: Box Cricket Champions trophy — presented to the Six Hitters, crowned champions of The Office Challenge.

studies.about_client: The Office Challenge is a corporate inter-departmental games tournament that brings colleagues together for friendly competition across classic indoor and outdoor games. Teams compete under creative team names — from the Box Cricket 'Six Hitters' to the 'O2C Royals' — making it a memorable team-building experience.
studies.about_event: The Office Challenge 2026 featured five games: Carrom King, Box Cricket, Dart Game, Snake & Ladder, and Jenga. Each category had a Winner, Runner Up, and 2nd Runner Up. A grand Rolling Trophy was also awarded to the overall champion team. The event was held in April 2026.
studies.design_brief: A full trophy set covering five game categories plus a grand Rolling Trophy. Each category received a themed trophy design — carrom board face for Carrom King, star trophies for Snake & Ladder and Dart Game, red cricket ball for Box Cricket, winged figure for Jenga, and a crowned cup for the Rolling Trophy.
production_notes: Carrom King: 3 trophies with carrom board face, gold-tone base on red plinth
Snake & Ladder & Dart Game: Star-shaped gold trophies on red bases
Box Cricket: Tall cricket trophy with red ball and gold wing stand
Jenga: Winged figure trophies
Rolling Trophy: Large crowned cup trophy
Custom engraved plaques for each position (Winner, Runner Up, 2nd Runner Up)
studies.outcome: A complete custom trophy set for 5 game categories plus the rolling trophy — enabling The Office Challenge to recognise champions across all events in style.

studies.title: 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026
studies.subtitle: Two custom trophies for an international quality education summit in Mauritius — an oval shield for Mathematics and a wave-form trophy for Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry)
studies.client: Mauritian Society for Quality Circles and Community Wellness (MSQCCw) — Mauritius
studies.tagline: From Bengaluru to Mauritius — precision-crafted trophies for competitions that cross borders.

photos.alt: MSQCCw 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026 — gold oval shield trophy for the Mathematics competition, with engraved plaque on a black marble base.
photos.caption: Mathematics competition award — oval shield in gold finish on black marble base

photos.alt: MSQCCw 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026 — wave-form gold trophy for Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poem) competition, with full event details and MSQCCw-WCTQEE branding.
photos.caption: Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry) award — wave-form trophy with full summit branding

studies.about_client: The Mauritian Society for Quality Circles and Community Wellness (MSQCCw) is an organisation dedicated to promoting quality culture, innovation and excellence among youth in Mauritius. It operates under the patronage of the World Council for Total Quality and Excellence in Education (WCTQEE) and organises the annual Quality Youth Initiatives Summit — a multi-event competition encompassing Debate, Mathematics, Poster & Slogan Making, and Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry). The 2026 summit runs 24–29 July in the Republic of Mauritius.
studies.about_event: The 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026 is an international gathering of students and educators competing under the theme 'Youth Leading Quality, Innovation and Excellence.' Organised by MSQCCw under WCTQEE patronage, the summit features four competition tracks. Meru Trophy supplied individual recognition awards for the Mathematics and Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry) tracks — trophies that travel from Bengaluru to Mauritius to honour young achievers on an international stage.
studies.design_brief: Two distinct trophy forms were required for different competition disciplines. The Mathematics award uses a classic oval shield format — timeless, authoritative, instantly legible as an academic prize. The Kavi Samelan award uses a flowing wave form — a dynamic silhouette that evokes creative expression and the rhythm of poetry. Both carry the full event identity: summit name, date, location, organiser name, patronage line, competition category, and theme text. The brief was clarity at a distance and dignity on the shelf.
production_notes: Oval shield trophy: cast metal frame in electroplated gold finish, black marble base, engraved brass nameplate
Wave-form trophy: sculpted wave silhouette in gold-finish metal, black solid base, full engraved panel with summit details
Both trophies carry 7-line engraving: event name, dates, location, organiser, patronage, competition category, and theme
Designed to be legible when photographed at ceremonies — high-contrast engraving on bright gold field
International shipping to Mauritius; packed in custom foam-lined boxes
studies.outcome: Trophies delivered ahead of the July 2026 summit. Two awards covering the Mathematics and Kavi Samelan competition tracks — part of Meru Trophy's growing portfolio of internationally shipped recognition awards.

external_links.label: WCTQEE — World Council for Total Quality and Excellence in Education

studies.title: Walk for Aarogya 2025
studies.subtitle: Custom gold participation and finisher medals for a community wellness walkathon
studies.tagline: Every step counts — a medal that makes the walk worth remembering.

photos.alt: Walk for Aarogya 2025 — gold medal with laurel wreath border and central disc featuring the Walk for Aarogya logo and tagline 'Walk, Stay Simply, Stay Fittest'.
photos.caption: Walk for Aarogya 2025 finisher medal — gold finish with laurel wreath and event branding

studies.about_client: Walk for Aarogya is a community wellness initiative that organises walkathons promoting active, healthy lifestyles. The name 'Aarogya' (Sanskrit: good health) reflects the programme's core mission — encouraging participants of all ages to walk as a simple, accessible path to fitness. The event's tagline, 'Walk, Stay Simply, Stay Fittest,' appears on every medal.
studies.about_event: Walk for Aarogya 2025 is a community walkathon bringing together health-conscious participants for a guided walk event. Every participant receives a custom finisher medal — a tangible reminder of their commitment to wellness. The medal design centres on the Walk for Aarogya branding within a classic laurel wreath border, finished in bright gold tone.
studies.design_brief: The client needed a medal that felt both celebratory and accessible — not a competitive podium award, but a token of participation that every walker would be proud to keep. The laurel wreath border (a universal symbol of achievement) wraps a custom-printed central disc carrying the event logo and tagline. The overall finish is bright gold to convey a sense of achievement and encourage photo sharing.
production_notes: Die-cast zinc alloy medal body with bright gold electroplate finish
Laurel wreath border in high relief, surrounding a recessed central disc
Full-colour printed centre disc with Walk for Aarogya logo and event tagline
Standard 10mm V-ribbon attachment at top for lanyard
Packaged in individual polybags for on-event distribution
studies.outcome: Medals delivered for the 2025 event. Worn and shared by participants as a personal achievement token, extending the Walk for Aarogya brand through word-of-mouth and social media sharing.

studies.title: KPL-S 2025 Winner & Runner-Up Trophies
studies.subtitle: Tiered champion and runner-up trophies for a local sports league — distinct heights to mark the podium difference
studies.tagline: Two trophies, one statement — the gap between winning and almost winning.

photos.alt: KPL-S 2025 Winner and Runner-Up trophies — a tall and shorter gold trophy pair on black bases, with engraved 'Winner' and 'Runner' nameplates.
photos.caption: KPL-S 2025 Winner (tall) and Runner-Up trophies — gold finish with black base, engraved nameplates

studies.about_client: KPL-S is a local sports league organising competitive matches and seasonal tournaments. Like many community leagues, KPL-S uses end-of-season trophies to formally recognise the top two finishers and celebrate the competitive spirit of the league.
studies.about_event: The KPL-S 2025 season concluded with a podium trophy presentation for the Winner and Runner-Up teams. The two-trophy set uses a tiered height strategy: the Winner trophy stands taller to signal supremacy, while the Runner-Up trophy — identical in design but shorter — acknowledges strong performance without diminishing the gap to first place.
studies.design_brief: The brief was clear: the trophies must look like a matched set but the Winner must instantly read as higher-ranked. We used a tiered column approach — same base, same finishing, same nameplate format, but meaningfully different heights. Both trophies carry engraved nameplates (WINNER / RUNNER) on gold-finish columns, seated on matching black bases. The result is a coherent visual set with a clear hierarchy.
production_notes: Two-trophy set: Winner (tall column) and Runner-Up (shorter column)
Gold electroplated column with stepped tiers
Matching black resin bases for both trophies
Engraved gold nameplate: 'KPL-S · WINNER 2025' / 'KPL-S · RUNNER 2025'
Proportional height difference maintained for clear podium hierarchy when displayed side by side
studies.outcome: Delivered as a matched presentation set for the KPL-S 2025 season finale. The tiered height design immediately communicates the competitive result in any photo or display context.

studies.title: Bharat Value Champion FY26
studies.subtitle: Five gold star trophies celebrating core-value champions — built by partners, driven by growth.
studies.client: Bharat (Built by Partners. Driven by Growth.)
studies.tagline: Five leaders. Five values. One gold star for each.

photos.alt: Five Bharat Value Champion FY26 gold star trophies on black bases, each engraved with an individual name and core value
photos.caption: Bharat Value Champion FY26 — 5 personalised gold star trophies (Passion, Speed, Integrity, Commitment)

studies.about_client: Bharat is a growth-driven organisation with the tagline 'Built by Partners. Driven by Growth.' The company runs an internal Value Champion recognition programme each financial year to celebrate employees who embody its core values.
studies.about_event: The Bharat Value Champion FY26 awards recognised outstanding individuals across five company values: Passion, Speed (x2 recipients), Integrity, and Commitment. Each trophy is individually engraved with the recipient's name and value category.
studies.design_brief: Five matching gold star trophies, each personalised with the recipient's name and value category via an engraved gold nameplate on a black base. The star motif reinforces the 'champion' theme.
production_notes: Set of 5 gold star trophies, each individually engraved
Gold-tone star figurine on a faceted stem
Black stepped base with a gold nameplate panel
Nameplate: Bharat logo · Recipient name · VALUE CHAMPION FY26 · Value word
Recipients: Mr Amit Jalan (Passion), Mr Abhijeet Anand (Speed), Mr Sameer Goswami (Speed), Mr Shailesh Sultania (Integrity), Mr Abhishek Gulgulia (Commitment)
studies.outcome: A cohesive set of five personalised star trophies for the Bharat FY26 annual recognition ceremony.

studies.title: HDFC Bank — Highest SK NOP, March 2026
studies.subtitle: Ornate personalised shield plaques honouring top policy performers for March 2026 — Telangana and Karnataka.
studies.tagline: Recognition that carries a face, a name, and a state.

photos.alt: Two HDFC Bank Highest SK NOP shield plaques for March 2026 — ornate gold shield frames with embedded recipient photos, state maps of Telangana and Karnataka
photos.caption: HDFC Bank Highest SK NOP March 2026 — personalised shield plaques for Telangana (NOP 257) and Karnataka (NOP 204) top performers

studies.about_client: HDFC Bank is one of India's largest private sector banks, with a rigorous performance recognition programme across its vast nationwide network.
studies.about_event: The 'Highest SK NOP' award recognises HDFC Bank staff who achieved the highest number of policy activations in a month. March 2026 honoured Neela Srinivas (NOP 257, Telangana) and Rajesh Chigurupati (NOP 204, Karnataka). Each plaque features an embedded recipient photo and the state map emblem.
studies.design_brief: Shield-shaped plaques with a warm gold-tone UV-printed face featuring the HDFC Bank logo, award title, recipient name, and a personalised photo inset at the top. A state map medallion (Telangana / Karnataka) with an outstretched-hands motif anchors the bottom.
production_notes: Two individually personalised shield plaques
Octagonal shield form with decorative gold border
UV-printed gold-tone face on dark wood frame
Recipient photo in a crystal lens at the top
State map medallion at the bottom with hands motif
Side gold column pillars for stability
Neela Srinivas — NOP 257, Telangana; Rajesh Chigurupati — NOP 204, Karnataka
studies.outcome: Two bespoke personalised shield plaques delivered to HDFC Bank's top state performers for March 2026.

studies.title: ADAS B2B — Test Division Q4 FY 2025-26
studies.subtitle: Personalised gold medals and an engraved recognition trophy for a corporate B2B Test team's quarterly top performers
studies.tagline: Every name on a medal is a story of a quarter well earned.

photos.alt: Personalised gold medals for ADAS B2B Test Division Q4 2025-26 — engraved with individual recipient names including Shreyas MP, Smruti Amerkar, Sai Patil, Sooraj Shanbhag, Sagar K and others
photos.caption: Individual gold medals engraved with each recipient's name — Q4 FY 2025-26

photos.alt: Recognition trophy engraved 'ADAS B2B / Test / Q4 : 2025-26' — corporate quarterly performance award
photos.caption: Central recognition trophy for the ADAS B2B Test team's Q4 top performers

studies.about_client: ADAS B2B is the business-to-business division within a corporate organisation, recognising top performance across its Test team channel. The quarterly award programme honours employees who delivered exceptional results during Q4 of FY 2025-26.
studies.about_event: The Q4 FY 2025-26 Recognition Awards celebrate the ADAS B2B Test Division's top performers for the final quarter of the financial year. Each recipient received a personalised gold medal engraved with their name. Recipients included Shreyas MP, Smruti Amerkar, Sai Patil, Sooraj Shanbhag, Sagar K, and additional team members. A central engraved trophy bearing 'ADAS B2B / Test / Q4 : 2025-26' anchored the award ceremony.
studies.design_brief: The brief called for a dual-format award: a central trophy as a team milestone marker, and individual personalised gold medals so every recipient takes home a tangible keepsake. The medals were engraved with each winner's name, making the recognition personal at scale.
production_notes: Central recognition trophy with engraved nameplate: 'ADAS B2B / Test / Q4 : 2025-26'
Multiple personalised gold medals, individually engraved with recipient names
Recipients: Shreyas MP, Smruti Amerkar, Sai Patil, Sooraj Shanbhag, Sagar K, and others
Gold-tone finish medals for consistent, premium look across the batch
Bulk production with individual name personalisation per medal
studies.outcome: Full set of personalised gold medals and a central recognition trophy delivered for the ADAS B2B Test Division's Q4 FY 2025-26 awards cycle.

studies.title: Laguna Parivar Milan — 20 Years of Laguna
studies.subtitle: Four vendor-recognition trophies for a premier Bangalore shirt manufacturer's 20th anniversary celebration
studies.event: Laguna Parivar Milan 2026 — 20th Anniversary Vendor Awards
studies.tagline: Twenty years of excellence — four trophies that celebrate the partners who made it possible.

photos.alt: All four Laguna Parivar Milan 20-years vendor-recognition trophies lined up — Best Factory KPR (tall gold figure with crystal globe), Best Service Provider Winner, Best Fabric Supplier Runner Up (dark angular forms), and Best Grassroot OBR Housekeeping (gold star figure on decorative base).
photos.caption: The complete set of four awards for Laguna Parivar Milan — 20 Years of Laguna.

photos.alt: Close-up of the Best Factory – KPR trophy: tall gold figure holding a crystal globe, mounted on a black base with gold plaque reading '20 Years of Laguna / Laguna Parivar Milan / Best Factory – KPR'.
photos.caption: Best Factory – KPR: the highlight trophy of the evening, featuring a crystal-globe topper on a gold sculpted figure.

studies.about_client: Laguna Clothing Private Limited is one of India's foremost high-end shirt manufacturers, based in Bangalore (Kanakapura area). Founded in 2006 as a joint venture between Tessitura Monti (Italy) and Aquarelle Group (Mauritius), the company was fully acquired by CIEL Textile in 2020. With an annual capacity of 5 million shirts, Laguna supplies premium formal, semi-formal and casual shirts to global brands including Polo Ralph Lauren, Tommy Hilfiger, Charles Tyrwhitt, Hugo Boss, Hackett, REISS, Calvin Klein and Brooks Brothers. The company holds ISO 26000, GOTS, Oeko-Tex, FLOCERT and Sedex certifications.
studies.about_event: Laguna Parivar Milan (ಲಗುನ ಪರಿವಾರ ಮಿಲನ — 'Laguna Family Meet') is Laguna Clothing's annual gathering that brings together the company's internal teams, factory partners, fabric suppliers and service providers. The 2026 edition marked a significant milestone: 20 years since the company's founding. As part of the celebrations, Laguna recognised its top-performing vendor and supply-chain partners across four categories — Best Factory (KPR), Best Service Provider (Winner), Best Fabric Supplier (Runner Up) and Best Grassroot OBR Housekeeping.
studies.design_brief: The brief called for four distinct trophies that share a unified anniversary identity. Each trophy features the '20 Years of Laguna' gold plaque and the Laguna Parivar Milan event branding. Trophy forms vary by award tier: the flagship Best Factory trophy uses a tall gold figurine with a crystal-globe topper; the service and fabric supplier awards use sleek dark angular figures; the housekeeping award features a gold star form on a festive base — ensuring each recipient's trophy feels unique while all four read as a family.
production_notes: Best Factory – KPR: tall gold sculpted figure with faceted crystal globe topper, black base, gold '20 Years' event plaque
Best Service Provider (Winner): dark angular sculptural figure, black base, gold event plaque
Best Fabric Supplier (Runner Up): similar angular dark form, slightly smaller, gold event plaque
Best Grassroot OBR Housekeeping: gold star figurine on decorated festive base with event plaque
All four trophies share consistent '20 Years of Laguna / Laguna Parivar Milan' plaque branding
studies.outcome: Four vendor-recognition trophies delivered for Laguna Clothing's landmark 20th anniversary celebration. The awards honoured the supply-chain partners central to two decades of world-class shirt manufacturing.

studies.title: Thalapathy CM Cup 2026
studies.subtitle: Cricket Tournament Trophies, Medals & Awards
studies.tagline: A full suite of cricket tournament awards — from winner medals to individual acrylic honours — for a tournament held in celebration of Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Thalapathy Vijay.

photos.alt: Large gold winner's cup trophy for the Thalapathy CM Cup 2026 cricket tournament, engraved 'Thalapathy CM Cup 2026 Winners'.
photos.caption: The champion team's winner's cup trophy — the centrepiece award of the Thalapathy CM Cup 2026.

photos.alt: Three custom acrylic individual performance trophies laid out side by side: Man of the Series, Best Fielder, and Man of the Match for the Thalapathy CM Cup 2026.
photos.caption: Individual performance awards in acrylic: Man of the Series, Best Fielder, and Man of the Match.

photos.alt: Gold winner medals with red ribbons engraved 'VIJAY TN | THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026 | WINNERS' for the champion team.
photos.caption: Gold winner medals with red ribbons — bearing the VIJAY TN | Thalapathy CM Cup 2026 | Winners inscription.

photos.alt: Silver runner-up medals with blue ribbons engraved 'VIJAY TN | THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026 | RUNNERS' for the runner-up team.
photos.caption: Silver runner-up medals with blue ribbons — matching pair to the winner medals.

photos.alt: Decorative organiser shield featuring a portrait of Chief Minister Vijay with the inscription 'THALAPATHY VIJAY, CHIEF MINISTER OF TN, 2D Cricketers, THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026, ORGANISER'.
photos.caption: Organiser's commemorative shield — a tribute to 2D Cricketers featuring CM Vijay's portrait.

studies.about_client: 2D Cricketers is a Tamil Nadu cricket club that organises community cricket tournaments. The club named its 2026 tournament the 'Thalapathy CM Cup' in honour of actor-turned-politician Vijay (Thalapathy), whose TVK party won the 2026 Tamil Nadu state elections, making him Chief Minister. The 'VIJAY TN' branding across all awards reflects this historic political milestone.
studies.about_event: The Thalapathy CM Cup 2026 is a cricket tournament organised by 2D Cricketers, Tamil Nadu, named in celebration of Vijay becoming the state's Chief Minister. The tournament recognised achievement at both team and individual level — champion and runner-up sides received custom medals, top performers received acrylic trophies, and the organising club received a commemorative shield bearing CM Vijay's portrait.
studies.design_brief: The brief called for a unified award suite with consistent 'VIJAY TN | THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026' branding across all pieces. The champion team received a large ornamental winner's cup plus gold medals with red ribbons; the runners-up received matching silver medals with blue ribbons. Three individual-performance acrylic trophies (Man of the Series, Best Fielder, Man of the Match) provided recognition beyond team results. A standalone organiser shield with a printed portrait of CM Vijay served as a commemorative keepsake for the event hosts.
production_notes: Winner's trophy: large gold ornamental cup with 'Thalapathy CM Cup 2026 Winners' engraving
Gold winner medals: red ribbon, 'VIJAY TN | THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026 | WINNERS' inscription
Silver runner-up medals: blue ribbon, 'VIJAY TN | THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026 | RUNNERS' inscription
Individual acrylic trophies: Man of the Series, Best Fielder, Man of the Match — three distinct pieces
Organiser shield: decorative stand-alone shield with CM Vijay's portrait and 'THALAPATHY VIJAY, CHIEF MINISTER OF TN | 2D Cricketers | THALAPATHY CM CUP 2026 | ORGANISER' text
studies.outcome: A complete five-category award suite delivered for the Thalapathy CM Cup 2026 — honouring both the tournament's champions and the organising club, with consistent political-celebration branding across every piece.
